evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Take full ownership of the stability of our marketing data pipelines — be the first to respond to incidents and drive resolution
evidence.domain_risk: Partner with marketers to automate and improve marketing processes using data
evidence.collaboration_width: data analysts; engineers; software engineers; marketing teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: Maintain expertise across marketing tech stack including ad platforms, Airbyte, Zoho CRM, GTM, and web analytics
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, build, and maintain our core marketing data models — you know them by heart and can answer any question with data within minutes
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Partner with marketers to automate and improve marketing processes using data
evidence.autonomy_level: Define a forward-looking vision for the marketing data stack and drive its development
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, build, and maintain our core marketing data models
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Designing and building new core data models is combined with ongoing maintenance, reflecting a mix of greenfield and fix/scale work.
evidence.work_arrangement: Berlin, Germany (Remote throughout Germany; offices in Hamburg, Berlin, Munich)
evidence.ai_role: Maintain expertise across marketing tech stack including ad platforms, Airbyte, Zoho CRM, GTM, and web analytics
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Tech stack specified contains no AI tools, GenAI platforms, or AI-building infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: Take full ownership of the stability of our marketing data pipelines
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Ownership framed around operational stability and incident response, not defining or implementing testing practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: be the first to respond to incidents and drive resolution
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Operational reliability concerns dominate, with emphasis on incident response and pipeline stability.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The emphasis on stability, incident response, and resolution indicates a rigour-first orientation focused on reliability and data accuracy rather than speed.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Marketing attribution models and unit economics (ROAS, LTV) directly affect financial decision-making and revenue attribution.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools and existing infrastructure signal a growing function with established pipelines, not early-stage; no multi-team scale indicated.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Core responsibilities specify technical domain (BigQuery, dbt, marketing tech stack, incident response) with enough precision to understand the role's Tuesday morning.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role explicitly serves marketing teams with focus on marketing process automation and commercial metrics like CAC, ROAS, and LTV.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The 'define' verb indicates the role sets strategy and direction for the marketing data function rather than executing against predetermined priorities.
